positive: Minimalist abstract forest scene, composed of stylized, geometric silhouettes of birch and pine trees in a dense cluster. The composition is centered and highly symmetrical, using strong contrast between deep forest emerald greens and crisp, creamy off-white negative space. Emphasize clean lines, bold shapes, and a continuous, graphic pattern suitable for repeat print. Flat graphic design style, vector art quality, with subtle use of golden yellow accents at the tips of needles. Studio lighting, highly detailed, print-ready.
negative: photorealistic, grainy, low contrast, blur, artifact, text, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, muted colors, bokeh, sketch, painting
